name: scoring
description: Generates a per-answer + overall hiring report from a completed interview using Groq llama-3.3-70b-versatile. Reads from the recruit SQLite DB and persists report.json + report.md to artifacts/scoring.

capabilities.name: score_interview
capabilities.description: Run scoring for an interview (or return cached report).

capabilities.name: delete_report
capabilities.description: Drop cached report so the next run regenerates.
